mainEntity.name: How to Stop Your Competition from Winning AI Search Search Results
mainEntity.text: How to Stop Your Competition from Winning AI Search Search Results

acceptedAnswer.text: Seeing your rival's firm mentioned by Perplexity or ChatGPT hurts. They likely have a stronger 'knowledge graph.' You can fix this by building a better network of authoritative citations and specialized content that AI models prioritize. It’s a race for digital territory, and you don’t want to come in second. Reach out to see how we can pivot your strategy to defeat the competition.
